name: Citrus Vinaigrette Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons balsamic or white wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange juice, lemon juice, balsamic or white wine vinegar, crushed garlic, salt, dry mustard powder, freshly-ground black pepper, and brown sugar in a screw-top jar.
2. Shake thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Allow the dressing to sit for at least 30 minutes before using to allow flavors to meld.
4. The vinaigrette will keep for up to two days when stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
